name: testRefundDialogDisplaysCorrectTextAndAmount
description: All refundable transactions display correct refund dialog text and pre-filled refund amount.
descriptionHtml: All refundable transactions display correct refund dialog text and pre-filled refund amount.

steps.name: Navigate to '/' endpoint
Login to the site as '0810.103214.25.super@email.com'
Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field
Press 'Login' button

testStage.description: All refundable transactions display correct refund dialog text and pre-filled refund amount.

steps.name: Click on 'Transactions' in the Header
Set start and end date: 05-08-2025 to 05-08-2025
Set start and end date: 05-08-2025 to 05-08-2025
Select 'CompanyForTestRunOnly Inc.' company using filter
Select 'MerchantCompanyForTestRunOnly Inc.' business unit using filter
Click 'Refund transaction'
Verify: refund dialog header is correct
Verify: refund message contains correct max amount and currency
Verify: refund amount input is pre-filled with correct value
Verify: increase amount button to refund is disabled
Click on the 'Close' icon to close form
